attractions.name: Minneriya National Park
attractions.description: Famed for "The Gathering," where large herds of wild Asian elephants congregate around the reservoir in the dry season. Key habitat for many endemic mammals, birds, and other wildlife including spotted deer, monkeys, peacocks, and sometimes even leopards
source_files: Srilanka/Mr. Shishir_ Sri Lanka_ All Inclusive Guide.pdf
